meta.source_description: Image editing leaderboard via text-to-image public arena endpoint

models.name: Riverflow 2.0
models.note: Sourceful's Riverflow uses a vision language model trained by Sourceful to allow chain of thought reasoning in combination with a third-party open weights diffusion model

tag.label: Edit People, Faces, or Character Attributes

models.name: GPT Image 1.5 (high)
models.note:
Generated using the OpenAI Images API with model_id: "gpt-image-1.5" and quality: "high".

Prompts were pre-pended with "Create the following as a square image:" for Text to Image, and "Edit the following to create a square image:" for Image Editing.

We found without pre-pending these instructions, images would not be produced natively as squares.

models.name: HiDream-O1-Image
models.note: HiDream-O1-Image is the original HiDream O1 model. HiDream has since introduced HiDream-O1-Image-Dev-2604, a fine-tuned version built specifically for Text to Image, as well as HiDream-O1-Image-1.5, which have been benchmarked and listed separately.

models.name: FLUX.2 [dev] Turbo
models.note: FLUX.2 [dev] Turbo is a distilled LoRA adapter for Black Forest Lab's FLUX.2 [dev] that generates images in 8 inference steps

tag.label: Edit People, Faces, or Character Attributes

models.name: HiDream-O1-Image-Dev
models.note: HiDream-O1-Image-Dev is the faster, distilled version of HiDream O1. HiDream has since introduced HiDream-O1-Image-Dev-2604, a fine-tuned version built specifically for Text to Image, as well as HiDream-O1-Image-1.5, which have been benchmarked and listed separately.

models.name: FLUX.2 [dev] Flash
models.note: FLUX.2 [dev] Flash is the same weights as FLUX.2 [dev] Turbo (a distilled LoRA adapter for Black Forest Lab's FLUX.2 [dev]) that generates images in 5 inference steps

models.name: GPT Image 1 (high)
models.note:
Generated using the OpenAI Images API with `model_id: "gpt-image-1"` and `quality: "high"`.

  Prompts were pre-pended with "Create the following as a square image:" for Text to Image, and "Edit the following to create a square image:" for Image Editing.


  We found without pre-pending these instructions, images would not be produced natively as squares.
